name: code-plugins
description: Local Claude Code plugin marketplace for curated engineering, memory, video, design, and productivity plugins.

plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.description: Memory compression system for Claude Code - persist context across sessions.

plugins.name: gstack
plugins.description: Garry's Stack — Claude Code skills plus fast browser automation for AI-assisted engineering workflows.

plugins.name: hyperframes
plugins.description: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

plugins.name: mattpocock-skills
plugins.description: Matt Pocock's agent skills for real engineering — grilling, spec/ticket flows, TDD, code review, domain modelling and more. Plug-and-play, not vibe coding.

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: UI/UX design intelligence. Searchable local database with 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, and 17 stacks.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques.
